title: phegopteris distans
intro: Phegopteris distans, also known as the distant maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Phegopteris distans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, infused in hot water, or used as a dried powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
